title: AIBOUX Shop Public Text Cleanup WIP Report
summary: 買い物客向け画面から不要なSEO説明・内部実装説明を削除しました。
削除対象は、クロール可能、内部リンク、Page guide、Trust / proof matrix などの見えてはいけない文言です。
canonical、robots、JSON-LD、BreadcrumbList、Product/Offer などの実SEOは維持しています。
public/g/m68.md、public/g/l68.md、public/g/d68.md に証跡を反映し、公開URLへWIP deployしました。
最新Worker Version IDは d50714e5-2b6d-42c9-ac10-0daa94fb5593 です。
verification: 17 public storefront URLs returned HTTP 200 and public HTML grep found no banned internal wording.
m68/l68/d68 public URLs returned HTTP 200 and text/markdown; charset=utf-8.
l68 public body contains Bark Progress Notification evidence.

bark.reason: Progress Bark succeeded with delivered=true, skipped=false, secretLogged=false. This is not a final acceptance notification.

notes: Broader Amazon-quality sales sprint remains active.
D1 subscription remote migration remains a separate not-final lane until permissions and production subscription verification are complete.
Source/public sha256 differs for /g bodies because the Worker injects runtime evidence such as Worker Version ID into public markdown.
